title: The Crutch and the Creeping Doubt: How AI Is Deepening Imposter Syndrome
excerpt: AI tools are making engineers faster. They may also be making imposter syndrome worse — and the feedback loop is more insidious than most teams are willing to admit.

title: Lightweight Repository Pattern in .NET
excerpt: Explore how to structure clean, maintainable data access in .NET using the repository pattern and a custom database context, powered by Dapper or ADO.NET.
